title: smilax nervomarginata
intro: Smilax nervomarginata, also known as the Nerve Vine or Nerve Root, is a climbing plant species in the Smilax genus, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Smilax nervomarginata include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Smilax nervomarginata is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in herbal capsules or topical applications.
